text.style: stroke: rgb(29, 77, 141); stroke-width: 2; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(208, 2, 27); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1; white-space: pre; direction: rtl;

path.style: stroke: none; stroke-width: 1; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: url(#SVGID_8); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;
